notes: v1.7 - A built-in screen saver (DreamService) that re-hosts the now-playing card, clock and battery on the idle screen with a Black / Photo / Web-page (e.g. Immich Kiosk) background - because a floating overlay is hidden when the screen saver starts. A fullscreen 'Cover' now-playing layout with large album art behind a music visualizer, a new high-quality Spectrum visualizer, and the source-app icon on the now-playing card. Preview buttons for the screen saver and now-playing. Lock the nav cluster's position (issue #2). An experimental (off by default) live-audio reactor and a set_screensaver.bat helper. Plus breaking-news alerts: urgent ntfy messages get a flashing full-attention popup with a spoken TTS read-out. See CHANGELOG.md for details.
